info.title: Gato API
info.description: Translation, vocabulary, and spaced-repetition API powering the Gato Chrome extension and web dashboard.

post.summary: Translate a word or phrase (DeepL-first, LLM-fallback)
Enrich an already-translated word with linguistic metadata
Save a new concept for the authenticated user

get.summary: List concepts with search/filter/sort and per-row tags + nextReviewAt
Export all concepts as csv, anki TSV, or json

post.summary: Bulk import concepts; invalid rows surface in errors[] rather than 400

get.summary: Check whether a concept already exists for this user (cache probe)
List distinct "src->tgt" language pairs present in the user's concepts

patch.summary: Bulk-update concept state and/or tag membership

get.summary: Retrieve a single concept with tags and review schedule

patch.summary: Patch translation / userNotes / exampleSentence / state on a concept

post.summary: Generate an LLM-authored example sentence for a concept
Assign a tag to a concept

delete.summary: Remove a tag from a concept

post.summary: Record a review result and advance the SM-2 schedule

get.summary: Generate quiz questions from due concepts

post.summary: Generate a sentence-reconstruction challenge for a concept
Validate a user's sentence tile ordering

get.summary: Vocabulary suggestions related to saved concepts
Aggregate stats for the dashboard header
Retrieve cached UI string translations for a language
